content_sections.heading: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), Division of Nematology, Pusa Campus, New Delhi invites applications for the engagement of Senior Research Fellow under the externally funded project on genome editing of Rice for nematode resistance. Download ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-IARI is recruiting 1 post of Senior Research Fellow. Project focuses on genome editing for nematode resistance in Rice.

rows.icar_indian_agricultural_research_instit: Enhancing climate resilience and ensuring food security with genome editing tools (Genome editing of Rice for nematode resistance)
Co-terminus with the project (initially up to 12 months, extendable)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

rows.date: 21 days from publication on ICAR-IARI Job Portal

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Master’s degree in Nematology/Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/Plant Pathology/Genetics & Plant Breeding/Botany or relevant life sciences with 4/5 years Bachelor’s degree (or PG with NET/GATE + 2 years research experience)
Experience in nematodes, molecular techniques, cloning, genetic transformation (especially rice), genome editing, plant tissue culture
Maximum 35 years (men), 40 years (women) (relaxation as per GoI/ICAR rules)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Emoluments Details
content_sections.text: Emoluments: ₹42,000 + 30% HRA per month (as per DST/PCPM/Z-06/2022 dated 26 June 2023). Additional Benefits: House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be provided as per rules. Hostel accommodation may be provided wherever available (in such cases HRA will not be admissible). Medical facilities as per ICAR norms. No other allowances or benefits (like Dearness Allowance, Pension, etc.) are admissible as this is a purely contractual/project position. Salary is consolidated and subject to periodic performance review. Note: Emoluments may be revised as per latest GoI/ICAR/DST guidelines during the project duration.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the Senior Research Fellow position will be done through the following process: Screening of Applications Applications received will be screened based on eligibility criteria, academic performance, relevant research experience, and publications. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Interview Shortlisted candidates will be called for online or in-person interview at IARI, New Delhi. The exact date, time, and mode will be communicated through email. Candidates are advised to regularly check their email (including spam folder). Document Verification Selected/wait-listed candidates will have to produce all original documents (educational certificates, experience letters, NET/GATE scorecard, caste certificate if applicable, etc.) for verification before issuance of the offer letter. Final Result The final result of the interview will be published on the official IARI website under the section “News > Contractual Jobs > View Results”. Important Notes: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The decision of the Selection Committee / Joint Director (Research), ICAR-IARI will be final and binding. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the Official Job Portal Go to: https://iari.res.in/bms/announcements/jobs.php Download the Application Proforma Download the prescribed Application Proforma from the notification. Fill the Application Form Fill all fields in BLOCK letters. Provide accurate personal details, educational qualifications (from High School onwards), work experience, publications, and NET/GATE details. Clearly mention desirable skills (molecular techniques, genome editing, nematode work, etc.). Affix a recent passport-size photograph. Prepare Supporting Documents Date of Birth proof / High School Certificate Educational certificates and mark sheets NET/GATE qualification proof Experience certificates Caste/Category certificate (for relaxation) No Objection Certificate (if employed or pursuing PhD) List of publications (first page of each) Create Single PDF Merge the filled & signed Application Proforma + all scanned self-attested documents into one single PDF file of appropriate size. Send the Application Email the PDF to: [email protected] Subject Line: “Application for SRF – Project Code 12-197-K” Last Date: 21 days from publication on the IARI Job Portal. After Submission Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Attend the online/in-person interview in Delhi. Bring all original documents for verification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Engagement is purely contractual and co-terminus with the project. No claim for regular appointment under ICAR. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Original documents will be verified before issuing offer letter. Selected candidate must produce NOC if currently employed or pursuing PhD.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR-IARI SRF 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted within 21 days from publication on the ICAR-IARI Job Portal.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Senior Research Fellow at ICAR-IARI?
faq.answer: ₹42,000 + 30% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. How many SRF vacancies are available at IARI New Delhi?
faq.answer: Total 01 post of Senior Research Fellow is available.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for ICAR-IARI SRF position?
faq.answer: Master’s degree in Nematology, Molecular Biology, Biotechnology or related fields with NET/GATE (or equivalent research experience).

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for ICAR-IARI genome editing recruitment?
faq.answer: “Enhancing climate resilience and ensuring food security with genome editing tools”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICAR-IARI SRF vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the application proforma and send single PDF to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for ICAR-IARI Senior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years for men and 40 years for women (relaxation applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Is experience in genome editing mandatory for IARI SRF post?
faq.answer: Desirable. Experience in molecular techniques, rice transformation, and nematode research is preferred.

faq.question: Q9. Will the interview for ICAR-IARI SRF be online or offline?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for online/in-person interview in Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Is the ICAR-IARI SRF position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.
